problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: Combining Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
